item.title: Wilmington, NC — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: Port city with Riverwalk, film production, and coastal Carolina charm.

item.title: Wiltz, Wiltz Canton — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: A picturesque town in the Luxembourg Ardennes, known for its medieval castle, the Wiltz Festival, and its role as a center for the local brewing industry.

item.title: Winnipeg, Manitoba — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: The Prairie’s cultural heart with a vibrant arts scene, affordable housing, and some of Canada’s sunniest weather — but cold winters.

item.title: Winston-Salem, NC — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: Twin City with tobacco history, Wake Forest, and affordable Piedmont living.

item.title: Winterthur, Zurich — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: A charming city near Zurich known for its Technical University, extensive museums including the Technorama science center, and a beautifully preserved old town.

item.title: Włocławek, Kuyavian-Pomeranian — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: A historic city on the Vistula River, known for its ceramics industry, Gothic cathedral, and the Włocławek Dam hydroelectric plant.

item.title: Wollongong, New South Wales — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: NSW’s coastal city with stunning escarpment views, surf beaches, and a growing university population.

item.title: Wonju, GWN — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: A gateway city to the Gangwon region, known for its medical industry, traditional markets, and nearby ski resorts.

item.title: Woodbridge, NJ — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: Middlesex County township with Menlo Park Mall and convenient NYC access.

item.title: Worcester, MA — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: Heart of the Commonwealth with colleges, cheaper than Boston, and New England seasons.

item.title: Wrocław, Lower Silesian — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: A beautiful city on the Oder River, known for its stunning Market Square, numerous bridges, colorful tenement houses, and a thriving tech and startup ecosystem.

item.title: Wuhan, Hubei — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: A major transportation hub in central China, known for its Yangtze River crossings, university district, and emerging semiconductor industry.

item.title: Wuxi, Jiangsu — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: A wealthy city on Lake Taihu, known for its scenic lakeside, historic gardens, and strong manufacturing and solar energy industries.

item.title: Xi'an, Shaanxi — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: Home of the Terracotta Warriors and ancient Silk Road capital, Xi’an offers deep history, a vibrant Muslim Quarter, and growing aerospace industry.

item.title: Xiamen, Fujian — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: A coastal city known for its subtropical climate, colonial Gulangyu Island, and role as a special economic zone and trade hub.

item.title: Xining, Qinghai — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: Capital of Qinghai province on the Tibetan Plateau, a gateway to Qinghai Lake and Kumbum Monastery with a distinct Tibetan-Hui cultural mix.

item.title: Xuzhou, Jiangsu — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: A historic city in northern Jiangsu, a key transportation hub known for its Han dynasty heritage and coal mining history.

item.title: Yakima, WA — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: Central Washington agricultural hub with wine country and the Yakima Valley sun.

item.title: Yamagata, Yamagata — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: A castle city at the foot of Mount Zao, known for its cherries, hot springs, and the spectacular Zao snow monsters.

item.title: Yamaguchi, Yamaguchi — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: A small historic city in western Honshu with a beautiful castle, five-story pagoda, and some of Japan’s lowest living costs.

item.title: Yantai, Shandong — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: A coastal city in Shandong known for its wine regions, French colonial heritage, and beautiful beaches on the Bohai Sea.

item.title: Yaroslavl, Yaroslavl Oblast — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: A historic Golden Ring city on the Volga, a UNESCO World Heritage site with stunning 13th-century churches and frescoes.

item.title: Yekaterinburg, Sverdlovsk Oblast — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: The capital of the Urals, a key industrial and cultural hub where Europe meets Asia, known for its constructivist architecture.

item.title: Yinchuan, Ningxia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: Capital of Ningxia, a walled city on the edge of the Gobi Desert, known for its Muslim Hui culture and wine-producing region.

item.title: Yokohama, Kanagawa — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: Japan’s second-largest city with a stunning harbor, vibrant Chinatown, and a relaxed coastal atmosphere just south of Tokyo.

item.title: Yongin, GYE — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: A rapidly growing city in Gyeonggi Province, home to Everland theme park and Samsung’s semiconductor cluster.

item.title: Yonkers, NY — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: Fourth-largest city in NY with the Hudson River waterfront and Getty Square.

item.title: York, PA — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: White Rose City with the York Revolution, the Colonial Complex, and a historic downtown.

item.title: Youngstown, OH — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: Steel Valley city with Youngstown State University and the Butler Institute of American Art.

item.title: Yuma, AZ — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: Sunniest city on earth with agricultural roots, winter vegetable production, and military presence.

item.title: Zabrze, Silesian — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: A historic mining city in Upper Silesia, home to the Queen Luiza coal mine museum and a key center of Poland’s industrial heritage.

item.title: Zacapa, ZA — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: One of the hottest cities in Guatemala, known for its rum production and tobacco industry.

item.title: Zacatecas, Zacatecas — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: UNESCO World Heritage city with stunning silver mining history, pink stone architecture, and dramatic hills.

item.title: Zadar, Zadar — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: A stunning Dalmatian city with Roman ruins, the unique Sea Organ and Greeting to the Sun installations, and a beautiful old town peninsula surrounded by crystal-clear waters.

item.title: Zagazig, Sharqia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: A Nile Delta city and agricultural center, known for its university and the nearby Bubastis archaeological site.

item.title: Zagreb, City of Zagreb — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: Croatia’s vibrant capital, a city of Austro-Hungarian elegance, colorful street art, a thriving café culture, and the historic Upper Town with its medieval charm.

item.title: Zalaegerszeg, Zala — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: A city in western Hungary near the Slovenian border, known for its Göcsej Museum, thermal baths, and the nearby Zala Springs Golf Resort.

item.title: Zaragoza, Aragon — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: A historic city on the Ebro River with two stunning cathedrals, Roman ruins, and a lively tapas culture.

item.title: Zenica, Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: An industrial city in central Bosnia on the Bosna River, known for its steel mill and the nearby medieval town of Vranduk.

item.title: Zermatt, Valais — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: A car-free Alpine resort at the foot of the iconic Matterhorn, one of the world’s most famous ski destinations with year-round glacier skiing and luxury hotels.

item.title: Zhengzhou, Henan — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: A major transportation hub in central China, known as the ‘Railway City’ and a growing center for logistics and manufacturing.

item.title: Zhongshan, Guangdong — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: A manufacturing city in the Pearl River Delta, named after Sun Yat-sen, with a strong lighting and hardware industry.

item.title: Zhuhai, Guangdong — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: A coastal resort city in Guangdong, known for its pleasant climate, beaches, and as a special economic zone connected to Macau by bridge.

item.title: Žilina, Žilina Region — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: A key transport hub in northwestern Slovakia, surrounded by the Malá Fatra mountains, with a charming old town and a growing automotive industry.

item.title: Zlín, — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: A unique Moravian city shaped by the Bata shoe company, featuring distinctive functionalist architecture and a strong industrial design heritage.

item.title: Zrenjanin, Vojvodina — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: A city in the Banat region of Vojvodina, known for its industrial heritage, the Begej River, and its well-preserved 19th-century architecture.

item.title: Zug, Zug — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: A wealthy city on Lake Zug with Switzerland’s lowest corporate tax rates, attracting global commodity traders and offering a high quality of life with Alpine views.

item.title: Zurich, Zurich — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
item.description: Switzerland’s largest city, a global financial hub on Lake Zurich with a stunning old town, vibrant cultural scene, and top-ranked quality of life.

item.title: Accessibility Statement
item.description:
Accessibility Statement

Last updated: June 28, 2026

Publisher: Northshore Press (https://northshorepress.co)

Our Commitment

Northshore Press is committed to ensuring digital accessibility for people with disabilities. We are continually improving the user experience for everyone and applying the relevant accessibility standards.

Conformance Status

The Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) defines requirements for designers and developers to improve accessibility for people with disabilities. It defines three levels of conformance: Level A, Level AA, and Level AAA.

item.title: Affiliate Disclosure
item.description:
Affiliate Disclosure

Last updated: June 28, 2026

Publisher: Northshore Press (https://northshorepress.co)

FTC Disclosure

In accordance with the Federal Trade Commission (FTC) guidelines, URCity discloses that some of the links on this website are affiliate links. This means that if you click on the link and make a purchase or sign up for a service, we may receive a commission at no additional cost to you.

Our Commitment to Transparency

URCity is reader-supported. When you click on certain links on our website and make a purchase or sign up for a service, we may earn a commission at no additional cost to you. This affiliate revenue helps us maintain and improve our free content.

item.title: Cookie Policy
item.description:
Cookie Policy

Last updated: June 30, 2026

Publisher: Northshore Press (https://northshorepress.co)

What Are Cookies?

Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help websites remember your preferences and improve your experience.

How We Use Cookies

Essential Cookies:

  • Required for the website to function properly
  • Cannot be disabled
  • These do not track you or store personal information

Analytics Cookies (with your consent):

  • We use Google Analytics 4 to understand how visitors interact with our site
  • This helps us improve content and user experience
  • Google Analytics sets cookies only after you click “Accept” on our cookie banner
  • If you decline, no analytics cookies are set and no tracking occurs
  • Data collected is anonymized and processed by Google

Third-Party Cookies

We use one third-party service that may set cookies:

item.title: Methodology
item.description:
Our Methodology

URCity combines data from official government sources with proprietary calculations to give you the most accurate picture of life in any city across the US, UK, and Canada. We currently cover 164 cities across 3 countries.

Data Sources

We use only official, verified data sources:

United States

  • Council for Community and Economic Research (C2ER) — Cost of Living Index
  • Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) — Consumer Expenditure Survey
  • Bureau of Economic Analysis (BEA) — Regional Price Parities
  • Zillow Research — Home values, rents, price per square foot
  • HUD Fair Market Rents — Rental affordability benchmarks
  • US Census Bureau — Population, income, education, commuting
  • IRS Statistics of Income — Migration patterns
  • National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA) — Climate normals
  • Tax Foundation — State and local tax rates
  • FCC Broadband Data — Internet availability and speeds
  • EPA Smart Location Database — Walkability and transit access
  • FBI Uniform Crime Reporting — Crime statistics
  • U.S. Energy Information Administration (EIA) — State-level natural gas prices and electricity costs

United Kingdom

  • Office for National Statistics (ONS) — Cost of living and earnings data
  • Rightmove — Home values and rental prices
  • ONS Annual Survey of Hours and Earnings — Income data
  • HM Revenue & Customs (HMRC) — Tax rates
  • Met Office — Climate data
  • Ofcom — Broadband availability
  • Ofgem — Gas and electricity price caps
  • Water UK — Water utility costs

Canada

  • Statistics Canada — Cost of living, income, and demographic data
  • Canadian Real Estate Association (CREA) — Home values and sales data
  • Canada Mortgage and Housing Corporation (CMHC) — Rental market data
  • Environment and Climate Change Canada — Climate data
  • Canada Revenue Agency — Tax rates
  • ISED (Innovation, Science and Economic Development) — Broadband data
  • Canada Energy Regulator — Natural gas and electricity prices

Calculation Methods

Cost of Living Index

Our cost of living indices are based on the C2ER methodology, which compares prices across six categories:

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description:
Privacy Policy

Last updated: June 28, 2026

Publisher: Northshore Press (https://northshorepress.co)

Introduction

URCity (“we,” “our,” or “us”) is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you visit our website.

Information We Collect

Automatically Collected:

  • IP address (anonymized where possible)
  • Browser type and version
  • Pages visited and time spent
  • Referring website
  • Device information

Via Forms:

  • Email address (if you subscribe to our newsletter)
  • Search queries (anonymized)

How We Use Your Information

  • Improve website functionality and content
  • Analyze traffic patterns
  • Personalize content recommendations
  • Send newsletters (only if you opt in)
  • Comply with legal obligations

Cookies and Tracking

We use cookies and similar technologies to:

item.description:
Terms of Service

Publisher: Northshore Press (https://northshorepress.co)

Acceptance of Terms

By accessing or using URCity.com, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our website.

Use of the Website

You may use URCity.com for personal, non-commercial purposes. You agree not to:

  • Use the site for any illegal purpose
  • Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems
  • Interfere with the proper working of the site
  • Copy, scrape, or redistribute our content without permission

Content and Data

All content on URCity.com is for informational purposes only. We strive for accuracy but make no guarantees. Data is sourced from public records and third-party providers and may not be current.
